RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0015 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: John Nguyen Date of Birth: 24/03/1979 SSN (tokenized): TKN-438289 Annual Income: $171,000 Loan Amount: $14,000 Branch: Berlin Employment: [x] Full-time [ ] Self-employed Housing: [x] Own [ ] Rent Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN24720AL Ford F-150 2019 EV Used 35,000 VIN49772AL Ford 320i 2021 ICE New 16,000 Authorized Signature: John Nguyen
